blood-pressure-calculator.title: Calculadora de Blood Pressure
blood-pressure-calculator.description: Free Blood Pressure Calculator — Interpret systolic and diastolic blood pressure readings and understand your cardiovascular health. Get instant classification of your BP according to clinical guidelines with personalized recommendations.

mean-arterial-pressure.title: Calculadora de Mean Arterial Pressure
mean-arterial-pressure.description: Free Mean Arterial Pressure Calculator — Calculate MAP from systolic and diastolic blood pressure. Essential for assessing tissue perfusion and cardiovascular function in clinical settings.

pulse-pressure.title: Calculadora de Pulse Pressure
pulse-pressure.description: Free Pulse Pressure Calculator — Compute pulse pressure from systolic and diastolic readings. Monitor arterial stiffness and cardiovascular risk with this simple clinical measurement.

cardiac-output.title: Calculadora de Cardiac Output
cardiac-output.description: Free Cardiac Output Calculator — Estimate cardiac output from heart rate and stroke volume. Assess how well your heart pumps blood to support vital organ function.

stroke-volume.title: Calculadora de Stroke Volume
stroke-volume.description: Free Stroke Volume Calculator — Calculate stroke volume from cardiac output and heart rate. Measure the amount of blood pumped per heartbeat for cardiac assessment.

ejection-fraction.title: Calculadora de Ejection Fraction
ejection-fraction.description: Free Ejection Fraction Calculator — Estimate left ventricular ejection fraction from stroke volume and end-diastolic volume. Critical for diagnosing and monitoring heart failure.

heart-age.title: Calculadora de Heart Age
heart-age.description: Free Heart Age Calculator — Estimate your heart age based on blood pressure, BMI, smoking status, and other risk factors. Understand your cardiovascular risk compared to your chronological age.

framingham-risk-score.title: Calculadora de Framingham Risk Score
framingham-risk-score.description: Free Framingham Risk Score Calculator — Estimate 10-year cardiovascular disease risk using the Framingham Heart Study model. Assess coronary heart disease risk for preventive care planning.

ascvd-risk.title: Calculadora de ASCVD Risk
ascvd-risk.description: Free ASCVD Risk Calculator — Estimate 10-year and lifetime atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease risk using the ACC/AHA pooled cohort equations. Guide statin therapy and prevention decisions.

chads-vasc-score.title: Calculadora de CHADS-VASc Score
chads-vasc-score.description: Free CHADS-VASc Score Calculator — Assess stroke risk in patients with atrial fibrillation using the CHADS-VASc scoring system. Guide anticoagulation therapy decisions for stroke prevention.

heart-rate-zone.title: Calculadora de Heart Rate Zone
heart-rate-zone.description: Free Heart Rate Zone Calculator — Determine your target heart rate zones for exercise based on age and resting heart rate. Optimize workout intensity for fat burn, cardio, and peak performance.

target-heart-rate.title: Calculadora de Target Heart Rate
target-heart-rate.description: Free Target Heart Rate Calculator — Calculate your ideal target heart rate for exercise using the Karvonen method. Train at the right intensity for maximum cardiovascular benefits.

waist-to-hip-ratio.title: Calculadora de Waist-to-Hip Ratio
waist-to-hip-ratio.description: Free Waist-to-Hip Ratio Calculator — Measure your waist-to-hip ratio to assess body fat distribution and cardiovascular risk. Simple anthropometric measurement for metabolic health screening.

waist-to-height-ratio.title: Calculadora de Waist-to-Height Ratio
waist-to-height-ratio.description: Free Waist-to-Height Ratio Calculator — Evaluate your waist-to-height ratio as a predictor of cardiometabolic risk. A simple and effective screening tool for central obesity and health risks.

body-roundness-index.title: Calculadora de Body Roundness Index
body-roundness-index.description: Free Body Roundness Index Calculator — Calculate your Body Roundness Index (BRI) from height and waist circumference. A newer anthropometric measure that estimates body fat distribution and health risk.

ponderal-index.title: Calculadora de Ponderal Index
ponderal-index.description: Free Ponderal Index Calculator — Calculate the Ponderal Index as an alternative to BMI for assessing body mass relative to height. Useful for pediatric and adult body composition assessment.

frame-size.title: Calculadora de Frame Size
frame-size.description: Free Frame Size Calculator — Determine your body frame size based on wrist circumference and height. Understand your skeletal frame type to set realistic weight and body composition goals.

lean-body-mass.title: Calculadora de Lean Body Mass
lean-body-mass.description: Free Lean Body Mass Calculator — Estimate your lean body mass (LBM) using validated formulas. Track muscle mass versus fat mass for fitness progress and body composition analysis.

fat-free-mass-index.title: Calculadora de Fat-Free Mass Index
fat-free-mass-index.description: Free Fat-Free Mass Index Calculator — Calculate FFMI as a height-adjusted measure of lean muscle mass. Used by athletes and clinicians to assess nutritional status and muscle development.

skeletal-muscle-mass.title: Calculadora de Skeletal Muscle Mass
skeletal-muscle-mass.description: Free Skeletal Muscle Mass Calculator — Estimate your skeletal muscle mass using anthropometric measurements. Monitor muscle development and sarcopenia risk for better health outcomes.

body-fat-caliper.title: Calculadora de Body Fat Caliper
body-fat-caliper.description: Free Body Fat Caliper Calculator — Estimate body fat percentage from skinfold measurements using Jackson-Pollock and other protocols. Track body composition changes with precision caliper readings.

navy-body-fat.title: Calculadora de Navy Body Fat
navy-body-fat.description: Free Navy Body Fat Calculator — Calculate body fat percentage using the US Navy circumference method. Military-standard body composition assessment using height, waist, neck, and hip measurements.

vo2-max-estimate.title: Calculadora de VO2 Max Estimate
vo2-max-estimate.description: Free VO2 Max Estimate Calculator — Estimate your VO2 max without exercise testing using age, gender, and activity level. Assess cardiorespiratory fitness for health and athletic performance.

met-minutes.title: Calculadora de MET Minutes
met-minutes.description: Free MET Minutes Calculator — Calculate MET-minutes of physical activity per week to meet exercise guidelines. Track your total weekly exercise volume for health and fitness goals.

exercise-heart-rate.description: Free Exercise Heart Rate Calculator — Find your optimal exercise heart rate range for different workout intensities. Train smarter with personalized heart rate targets for warm-up, aerobic, and anaerobic zones.

recovery-heart-rate.title: Calculadora de Recovery Heart Rate
recovery-heart-rate.description: Free Recovery Heart Rate Calculator — Measure your heart rate recovery after exercise as an indicator of cardiovascular fitness. Track how quickly your heart rate returns to baseline after exertion.

heart-rate-variability.description: Free Heart Rate Variability Calculator — Analyze your heart rate variability (HRV) for autonomic nervous system assessment. Monitor stress, recovery, and overall health through HRV metrics.

training-impulse.description: Free Training Impulse Calculator — Calculate TRIMP (training impulse) to quantify your workout load. Monitor training stress and balance intensity with recovery for optimal performance gains.

fitness-age.description: Free Fitness Age Calculator — Estimate your fitness age based on resting heart rate, BMI, and activity habits. Compare your cardiovascular fitness level to population norms for your age group.

physical-activity-level.description: Free Physical Activity Level Calculator — Determine your PAL score from your daily activity patterns. Estimate total energy expenditure and calorie needs based on lifestyle and exercise habits.

naegeles-rule.title: Calculadora de Naegele's Rule
naegeles-rule.description: Free Naegele's Rule Calculator — Calculate your estimated due date using Naegele's Rule based on last menstrual period. The standard obstetric method for estimating delivery date.

pregnancy-week-calculator.title: Calculadora de Pregnancy Week by Week
pregnancy-week-calculator.description: Free Pregnancy Week by Week Calculator — Track your current pregnancy week and see what to expect at each stage. Get weekly fetal development updates and maternal health tips.

expected-delivery-date.title: Calculadora de Expected Delivery Date
expected-delivery-date.description: Free Expected Delivery Date Calculator — Calculate your expected delivery date using multiple methods including LMP, conception date, and ultrasound dating. Comprehensive due date estimation tool.

child-bmi-percentile.title: Calculadora de Child BMI Percentile
child-bmi-percentile.description: Free Child BMI Percentile Calculator — Calculate BMI percentile for children and teens using CDC growth charts. Assess pediatric weight status and growth patterns for ages 2 to 19.

infant-growth-percentile.title: Calculadora de Infant Growth Percentile
infant-growth-percentile.description: Free Infant Growth Percentile Calculator — Plot infant weight, length, and head circumference on WHO growth charts. Monitor infant development from birth to 24 months.

height-predictor.title: Calculadora de Height Predictor
height-predictor.description: Free Height Predictor Calculator — Predict adult height for children using the mid-parental height method. Estimate final adult height based on parental heights and current growth trajectory.

target-height.title: Calculadora de Target Height
target-height.description: Free Target Height Calculator — Calculate target height range for children based on parental heights. Understand expected growth potential and monitor for growth disorders.

bone-age.title: Calculadora de Bone Age
bone-age.description: Free Bone Age Calculator — Estimate skeletal maturity and bone age from hand-wrist X-ray parameters. Assess growth potential and diagnose growth disorders in children and adolescents.

pediatric-blood-pressure.title: Calculadora de Pediatric Blood Pressure
pediatric-blood-pressure.description: Free Pediatric Blood Pressure Calculator — Assess blood pressure percentiles for children based on age, gender, and height. Identify hypertension and hypotension in pediatric patients.

pediatric-fever.title: Calculadora de Pediatric Fever Temperature
pediatric-fever.description: Free Pediatric Fever Temperature Calculator — Assess fever severity in children based on temperature, age, and measurement method. Guide when to seek medical attention for febrile children.

infant-formula-amount.title: Calculadora de Infant Formula Amount
infant-formula-amount.description: Free Infant Formula Amount Calculator — Calculate recommended formula amounts for infants based on age and weight. Ensure proper nutrition and feeding schedules for bottle-fed babies.

children-ibuprofen-dosage.title: Calculadora de Children's Ibuprofen Dosage
children-ibuprofen-dosage.description: Free Children's Ibuprofen Dosage Calculator — Calculate safe ibuprofen dosage for children based on weight and age. Ensure accurate medication dosing for fever and pain relief in pediatric patients.

apgar-score.title: Calculadora de APGAR Score
apgar-score.description: Free APGAR Score Calculator — Calculate the APGAR score for newborn assessment at 1 and 5 minutes after birth. Standard neonatal evaluation of appearance, pulse, grimace, activity, and respiration.

sleep-cycle-calculator.title: Calculadora de Sleep Cycle
sleep-cycle-calculator.description: Free Sleep Cycle Calculator — Plan your sleep schedule to wake up between sleep cycles for optimal alertness. Calculate ideal bedtime or wake time based on 90-minute sleep cycles.

wake-up-time-calculator.title: Calculadora de Wake-Up Time
wake-up-time-calculator.description: Free Wake-Up Time Calculator — Calculate the best time to wake up based on your bedtime and sleep cycles. Wake up during light sleep for a refreshed and energized morning.

sleep-debt.title: Calculadora de Sleep Debt
sleep-debt.description: Free Sleep Debt Calculator — Calculate your accumulated sleep debt and estimate recovery time. Track chronic sleep deprivation and plan catch-up sleep for better health.

power-nap.title: Calculadora de Power Nap
power-nap.description: Free Power Nap Calculator — Calculate the ideal nap duration based on sleep cycle timing. Maximize the benefits of napping without waking up groggy for enhanced productivity.

circadian-rhythm.title: Calculadora de Circadian Rhythm
circadian-rhythm.description: Free Circadian Rhythm Calculator — Assess your chronotype and optimal daily schedule based on your natural circadian rhythm. Align work, sleep, and meals with your biological clock.

phq9-depression-score.title: Calculadora de PHQ-9 Depression Score
phq9-depression-score.description: Free PHQ-9 Depression Score Calculator — Screen for depression severity using the validated PHQ-9 patient health questionnaire. Assess depressive symptoms and track treatment progress.

gad7-anxiety-score.title: Calculadora de GAD-7 Anxiety Score
gad7-anxiety-score.description: Free GAD-7 Anxiety Score Calculator — Screen for generalized anxiety disorder severity using the validated GAD-7 questionnaire. Assess anxiety symptoms and monitor treatment response.

stress-level.title: Calculadora de Stress Level
stress-level.description: Free Stress Level Calculator — Assess your current stress levels using the Perceived Stress Scale (PSS). Understand how stress affects your health and identify opportunities for stress management.

burnout-assessment.title: Calculadora de Burnout Assessment
burnout-assessment.description: Free Burnout Assessment Calculator — Evaluate your risk of professional burnout using validated assessment tools. Identify early signs of burnout across exhaustion, cynicism, and efficacy dimensions.

well-being-index.title: Calculadora de Well-Being Index
well-being-index.description: Free Well-Being Index Calculator — Calculate your overall well-being score across physical, mental, social, and emotional domains. Track wellness progress and identify areas for improvement.

resilience-score.title: Calculadora de Resilience Score
resilience-score.description: Free Resilience Score Calculator — Assess your psychological resilience using the Brief Resilience Scale (BRS). Measure your ability to bounce back from stress and adversity.

drug-dosage-calculator.title: Calculadora de Drug Dosage
drug-dosage-calculator.description: Free Drug Dosage Calculator — Calculate safe medication doses based on weight, concentration, and recommended dosing guidelines. Essential tool for healthcare professionals and caregivers.

iv-drip-rate.title: Calculadora de IV Drip Rate
iv-drip-rate.description: Free IV Drip Rate Calculator — Calculate intravenous drip rates in drops per minute based on volume, time, and drip factor. Essential for accurate IV fluid administration in clinical settings.

fluid-resuscitation.title: Calculadora de Fluid Resuscitation
fluid-resuscitation.description: Free Fluid Resuscitation Calculator — Calculate fluid resuscitation volumes using the Parkland formula for burn patients. Guide initial fluid therapy in emergency and critical care settings.

creatinine-clearance.title: Calculadora de Creatinine Clearance
creatinine-clearance.description: Free Creatinine Clearance Calculator — Estimate creatinine clearance using the Cockcroft-Gault formula. Assess renal function for drug dosing and kidney disease staging.

egfr-calculator.title: Calculadora de eGFR
egfr-calculator.description: Free eGFR Calculator — Calculate estimated glomerular filtration rate using the CKD-EPI equation. Stage chronic kidney disease and monitor renal function over time.

bsa-calculator.title: BSA Calculator (Mosteller)
bsa-calculator.description: Calculadora de Superfície Corporal (Mosteller) Grátis — Calcule a superfície corporal usando a fórmula de Mosteller. Essencial para dosagem de quimioterapia, avaliação de queimaduras e cálculos de função renal.

anion-gap.title: Calculadora de Anion Gap
anion-gap.description: Free Anion Gap Calculator — Calculate the serum anion gap from sodium, chloride, and bicarbonate levels. Evaluate acid-base disorders and identify metabolic acidosis causes.

oxygen-saturation.title: Calculadora de Oxygen Saturation
oxygen-saturation.description: Free Oxygen Saturation Calculator — Estimate oxygen saturation from partial pressure of oxygen using the oxygen dissociation curve. Assess respiratory function and oxygenation status.

alveolar-arterial-gradient.title: Calculadora de A-a Gradient
alveolar-arterial-gradient.description: Free Alveolar-Arterial Gradient Calculator — Calculate the A-a gradient to assess gas exchange efficiency. Diagnose causes of hypoxemia including V/Q mismatch and shunt.

glasgow-coma-scale.title: Calculadora de Glasgow Coma Scale
glasgow-coma-scale.description: Free Glasgow Coma Scale Calculator — Calculate the GCS score based on eye, verbal, and motor responses. Standardized neurological assessment for consciousness level in trauma and critical care.

apache-score.title: Calculadora de APACHE II Score
apache-score.description: Free APACHE II Score Calculator — Calculate the Acute Physiology And Chronic Health Evaluation II score for ICU severity assessment. Predict mortality risk in critically ill patients.

meld-score.title: Calculadora de MELD Score
meld-score.description: Free MELD Score Calculator — Calculate the Model for End-Stage Liver Disease score for liver transplant prioritization. Assess liver disease severity and three-month mortality risk.

child-pugh-score.title: Calculadora de Child-Pugh Score
child-pugh-score.description: Free Child-Pugh Score Calculator — Calculate the Child-Pugh classification for cirrhosis severity. Guide treatment decisions and prognosis for chronic liver disease patients.

curb65-score.title: Calculadora de CURB-65 Score
curb65-score.description: Free CURB-65 Score Calculator — Assess community-acquired pneumonia severity using the CURB-65 criteria. Guide hospitalization decisions and antibiotic therapy for pneumonia patients.

pneumonia-severity-index.title: Calculadora de Pneumonia Severity Index (PSI)
pneumonia-severity-index.description: Free Pneumonia Severity Index Calculator — Calculate the PORT score for pneumonia severity and mortality risk. Guide outpatient vs. inpatient management decisions for pneumonia patients.

ideal-body-weight.title: Calculadora de Ideal Body Weight
ideal-body-weight.description: Free Ideal Body Weight Calculator — Calculate ideal body weight using Devine, Robinson, Miller, and Hamwi formulas. Reference standard for drug dosing and nutritional assessment.

adjusted-body-weight.title: Calculadora de Adjusted Body Weight
adjusted-body-weight.description: Free Adjusted Body Weight Calculator — Calculate adjusted body weight for obese patients using IBW and actual weight. Used for accurate drug dosing and metabolic calculations.

corrected-calcium.title: Calculadora de Corrected Calcium
corrected-calcium.description: Free Corrected Calcium Calculator — Calculate corrected calcium levels for patients with abnormal albumin. Assess true calcium status in chronic kidney disease and critical illness.

fena-calculator.title: FENa Calculator (Fractional Excretion of Sodium)
fena-calculator.description: Calculadora de FENa (Excreção Fracionada de Sódio) Grátis — Calcule a excreção fracionada de sódio para diferenciar azotemia pré-renal de necrose tubular aguda. Teste essencial para diagnóstico de lesão renal aguda.

qtc-calculator.title: QTc Calculator (Corrected QT Interval)
qtc-calculator.description: Calculadora de Intervalo QT Corrigido (QTc) Grátis — Calcule o intervalo QT corrigido usando as fórmulas de Bazett, Fridericia, Framingham e Hodges. Rastreie o risco de prolongamento do QT e suscetibilidade a arritmias.

blood-alcohol-content.title: Calculadora de Blood Alcohol Content (BAC)
blood-alcohol-content.description: Free Blood Alcohol Content Calculator — Estimate your BAC based on drinks consumed, weight, gender, and time elapsed. Understand your intoxication level and when it is safe to drive.

alcohol-calories.title: Calculadora de Alcohol Calories
alcohol-calories.description: Free Alcohol Calories Calculator — Calculate calories from alcoholic beverages by drink type and quantity. Track alcohol-related calorie consumption for weight management and health goals.

caffeine-half-life.title: Calculadora de Caffeine Half-Life
caffeine-half-life.description: Free Caffeine Half-Life Calculator — Estimate how long caffeine stays in your system based on dose and metabolism. Plan your caffeine intake to avoid sleep disruption.

caffeine-by-beverage.title: Calculadora de Caffeine by Beverage
caffeine-by-beverage.description: Free Caffeine by Beverage Calculator — Compare caffeine content across coffee, tea, energy drinks, and sodas. Track your daily caffeine intake from all sources.

hangover-severity.title: Calculadora de Hangover Severity
hangover-severity.description: Free Hangover Severity Calculator — Assess hangover severity based on alcohol consumption, hydration, and sleep factors. Get personalized recovery tips and understand hangover risk factors.

ciwa-score.title: Calculadora de CIWA-Ar Score
ciwa-score.description: Free CIWA-Ar Score Calculator — Calculate the Clinical Institute Withdrawal Assessment for Alcohol scale. Monitor alcohol withdrawal severity and guide benzodiazepine therapy in detoxification.

3x3-matrix-calculator.description: Free 3x3 Matrix Calculator — Compute determinant inverse and adjugate of 3x3 matrices using cofactor expansion. Features step-by-step calculation with formula reference. Essential for linear algebra and 3D graphics transformations.

vector-addition.title: Calculadora de Vector Addition
vector-addition.description: Free Vector Addition Calculator — Add and subtract vectors in 2D or 3D with component-wise operations. Features resultant magnitude and direction display. Essential for physics engineering and game development.

vector-dot-product.title: Calculadora de Vector Dot Product
vector-dot-product.description: Free Vector Dot Product Calculator — Compute the dot product scalar product of two vectors in 2D or 3D. Features angle between vectors and projection calculation. Essential for physics work calculations and linear algebra.

vector-cross-product.title: Calculadora de Vector Cross Product
vector-cross-product.description: Free Vector Cross Product Calculator — Compute the cross product of two 3D vectors resulting in a perpendicular vector. Features magnitude and direction with right-hand rule explanation. Essential for physics torque and 3D graphics.

absolute-value-equation.title: Calculadora de Valor
absolute-value-equation.description: Resolvedor de Equações com Valor Absoluto — Resolva equações com barras de valor absoluto usando análise de casos passo a passo. Inclui visualização na reta numérica e exibição do conjunto solução. Essencial para estudantes de álgebra e preparação para desigualdades.

inequality-solver.title: Calculadora de Inequality
inequality-solver.description: Resolvedor de Desigualdades — Resolva desigualdades lineares e quadráticas com análise de intervalos passo a passo. Inclui gráficos na reta numérica e exibição em notação de intervalos. Perfeito para estudantes de álgebra e preparação para pré-cálculo.

interval-notation.title: Calculadora de Interval Notation
interval-notation.description: Free Interval Notation Calculator — Convert between inequality notation and interval notation with number line visualization. Features open closed and half-open intervals. Essential for algebra precalculus and domain range analysis.

function-calculator.title: Calculadora de Function
function-calculator.description: Free Function Calculator — Evaluate functions at given input values and compute function composition. Features domain checking and step-by-step substitution display. Perfect for algebra students and function analysis.

domain-and-range.title: Calculadora de Domain and Range
domain-and-range.description: Free Domain and Range Calculator — Find the domain and range of functions including polynomial rational radical and trigonometric. Features interval notation with step-by-step analysis. Essential for precalculus and calculus preparation.

slope-intercept.title: Calculadora de Slope Intercept Form
slope-intercept.description: Free Slope Intercept Form Calculator — Convert linear equations to slope-intercept form y equals mx plus b. Features slope and y-intercept extraction with graph visualization. Essential for algebra and graphing linear functions.

point-slope-form.title: Calculadora de Point Slope Form
point-slope-form.description: Free Point Slope Form Calculator — Write linear equations in point-slope form y minus y1 equals m times x minus x1. Features step-by-step conversion to slope-intercept form. Perfect for algebra students and coordinate geometry.

z-score-calculator.title: Calculadora de Z-Score
z-score-calculator.description: Free Z-Score Calculator — Calculate the z-score standard score from a raw score mean and standard deviation. Features probability interpretation with normal distribution reference. Essential for statistics hypothesis testing and data analysis.

p-value-calculator.title: Calculadora de P-Value
p-value-calculator.description: Free P-Value Calculator — Calculate p-values from z-scores t-scores chi-square and F-scores for hypothesis testing. Features one-tailed and two-tailed test options with significance level comparison. Essential for statistics and research analysis.

confidence-interval.title: Calculadora de Confidence Interval
confidence-interval.description: Free Confidence Interval Calculator — Compute confidence intervals for population means and proportions. Features z-interval and t-interval methods with margin of error display. Essential for statistics survey analysis and data science.

margin-of-error.title: Calculadora de Margin of Error
margin-of-error.description: Free Margin of Error Calculator — Calculate the margin of error for surveys and polls at various confidence levels. Features sample size and proportion-based calculation. Essential for statistics opinion polling and market research.

effect-size-calculator.title: Calculadora de Effect Size
effect-size-calculator.description: Free Effect Size Calculator — Compute Cohen d Hedges g and Glass delta effect sizes for comparing group means. Features interpretation guidelines with confidence intervals. Essential for statistics meta-analysis and research methodology.

mann-whitney-test.title: Calculadora de Mann-Whitney U Test
mann-whitney-test.description: Free Mann-Whitney U Test Calculator — Perform the non-parametric Mann-Whitney U test for comparing two independent groups. Features rank summation with step-by-step calculation. Essential for statistics when normality assumptions fail.

wilcoxon-signed-rank.title: Calculadora de Wilcoxon Signed-Rank Test
wilcoxon-signed-rank.description: Free Wilcoxon Signed-Rank Test Calculator — Perform the non-parametric Wilcoxon signed-rank test for paired or one-sample data. Features rank difference calculation with step-by-step analysis. Ideal for statistics and before-after study designs.

spearman-correlation.title: Calculadora de Spearman Correlation
spearman-correlation.description: Free Spearman Correlation Calculator — Compute the Spearman rank correlation coefficient rho for assessing monotonic relationships. Features rank transformation with step-by-step calculation. Essential for statistics and nonparametric correlation analysis.

fraction-to-percent.title: Conversor de Fraction para Percent
fraction-to-percent.description: Free Fraction to Percent Converter — Convert fractions to percentages with step-by-step division and multiplication by 100. Features proper and improper fraction support with simplified display. Perfect for math students and everyday calculations.

percent-to-fraction.title: Conversor de Percent para Fraction
percent-to-fraction.description: Free Percent to Fraction Converter — Convert percentages to fractions in simplest form with step-by-step simplification using GCD. Features decimal percent and mixed number percent support. Essential for math homework and real-world applications.

decimal-to-percent.title: Conversor de Decimal para Percent
decimal-to-percent.description: Free Decimal to Percent Converter — Convert decimal numbers to percentages by multiplying by 100. Features step-by-step conversion with examples. Perfect for financial math grade calculations and everyday percent use.

percent-to-decimal.title: Conversor de Percent para Decimal
percent-to-decimal.description: Free Percent to Decimal Converter — Convert percentages to decimal numbers by dividing by 100. Features step-by-step conversion with real-world examples. Essential for financial calculations interest rates and statistical data.

fraction-to-decimal-converter.title: Conversor de Fraction para Decimal
fraction-to-decimal-converter.description: Free Fraction to Decimal Converter — Convert fractions to terminating or repeating decimals with long division display. Features mixed number support and rounding options. Essential for math students and practical measurement conversion.

decimal-to-fraction-converter.title: Conversor de Decimal para Fraction
decimal-to-fraction-converter.description: Free Decimal to Fraction Converter — Convert terminating and repeating decimals to fractions with step-by-step algebraic method. Features fraction simplification and mixed number display. Perfect for math homework and precision measurement.

improper-to-mixed.title: Conversor de Improper para Mixed Number
improper-to-mixed.description: Free Improper to Mixed Number Converter — Convert improper fractions to mixed numbers with division and remainder display. Features step-by-step fraction decomposition. Essential for math students and fraction arithmetic preparation.

mixed-to-improper.title: Conversor de Mixed para Improper Fraction
mixed-to-improper.description: Free Mixed to Improper Fraction Converter — Convert mixed numbers to improper fractions with multiplication and addition steps. Features clear step-by-step calculation. Perfect for math students preparing for fraction operations.

simplify-fraction.title: Calculadora de Simplify Fraction
simplify-fraction.description: Free Simplify Fraction Calculator — Reduce fractions to lowest terms using GCD with step-by-step division display. Features proper improper and mixed fraction support. Essential for math students and everyday fraction simplification.

compare-fractions.title: Calculadora de Compare Fractions
compare-fractions.description: Free Compare Fractions Calculator — Compare two fractions and determine which is larger smaller or if they are equal. Features cross multiplication with inequality display. Perfect for math students and fraction ordering problems.

sales-tax-calculator.title: Calculadora de Sales Tax
sales-tax-calculator.description: Free Sales Tax Calculator — Calculate sales tax amount and total price including tax from pre-tax amount and tax rate. Features reverse tax calculation from total paid. Essential for shopping budgeting and business accounting.

discount-calculator.title: Calculadora de Discount
discount-calculator.description: Free Discount Calculator — Calculate final price after discount from original price and discount percentage. Features savings amount display and reverse discount calculation. Perfect for shopping deals price comparison and retail math.

tip-calculator.title: Calculadora de Tip
tip-calculator.description: Free Tip Calculator — Calculate tip amount per person and total bill for any tip percentage. Features bill splitting among multiple people with custom tip rate. Essential for dining out group meals and service gratuity.

markup-calculator.title: Calculadora de Markup
markup-calculator.description: Free Markup Calculator — Calculate the selling price and markup percentage from cost and desired profit. Features gross profit margin display with step-by-step business math. Essential for retail pricing and small business management.

profit-margin.title: Calculadora de Profit Margin
profit-margin.description: Free Profit Margin Calculator — Calculate gross profit margin percentage from revenue and cost of goods sold. Features net profit margin and markup comparison. Essential for business financial analysis and pricing strategy.

break-even.title: Calculadora de Break-Even
break-even.description: Free Break-Even Calculator — Calculate the break-even point in units and dollars from fixed costs variable costs and selling price. Features contribution margin display. Essential for business planning and financial feasibility analysis.

percentage-change.title: Calculadora de Percentage Change
percentage-change.description: Free Percentage Change Calculator — Calculate the percentage increase or decrease between two values. Features formula derivation and sign interpretation. Essential for finance statistics and tracking changes over time.

percentage-increase.title: Calculadora de Percentage Increase
percentage-increase.description: Free Percentage Increase Calculator — Calculate the result after a percentage increase from an original value. Features step-by-step multiplication by growth factor. Perfect for salary raises price increases and population growth calculations.

percentage-decrease.title: Calculadora de Percentage Decrease
percentage-decrease.description: Free Percentage Decrease Calculator — Calculate the result after a percentage decrease from an original value. Features step-by-step reduction factor calculation. Essential for sales discounts budget cuts and population decline analysis.

percentage-difference.title: Calculadora de Percentage Difference
percentage-difference.description: Free Percentage Difference Calculator — Calculate the percentage difference between two values using the average as reference. Features symmetric formula with absolute value display. Perfect for comparing measurements and scientific data analysis.
